subject: Real stories from our southern border
body:
In February, President Donald J. Trump issued a National Emergency declaration to address the growing security and humanitarian crisis... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59721f5b9d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 15, 2019
---
| | |
# **Real stories from our southern border**

**In February,** President Donald J. Trump issued a National Emergency declaration to address the growing security and humanitarian crisis along the U.S.–Mexico border.

**The official position** of Democrats in Congress is that the problem is “manufactured.” Their House Majority Leader maintains “there is no crisis.” _The New York Times_ disagrees. Although the paper’s editorial board still won't acknowledge there is a real _security_ threat from the human smuggling, drugs, and other crime that accompanies illegal immigration, they do finally acknowledge this much: “There is a crisis at the southern border.”

**Of course** , the _Times’_ change of heart came months after it called President Trump’s claim of an urgent border crisis [“false.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1e5f44962&e=3ee4985eea)

**But the most important voices** don’t belong to any politician or pundit. They belong to the people suffering because of Congress’ inaction. Washington is nearly 1,800 miles from our southern border. New York City is about 2,000 miles. If you want to understand the problem, go to its source—not to East Coast opinion makers.

**Here are just a few** of those stories:
* [“We’ve got to help these people whose rights are being abused,” sheriff says.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df52d85da8&e=3ee4985eea)

* [“We are urging you to please help,” says a Texas resident.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2113d31136&e=3ee4985eea)

* [“We must end the border crisis,” faith leader says.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2727fec1cd&e=3ee4985eea)

* [“Congress continues to do nothing to fix our broken immigration system,” Bristol County, Massachusetts, sheriff says.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9c0e2f531&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
## **President Trump pays respects at National Peace Officers' Memorial Service**

**Near the steps** of the U.S. Capitol today, thousands of law enforcement officers joined with friends and family to honor the lives of officers slain in the line of duty last year. President Trump addressed the families of those fallen officers today, promising them that these sacrifices will never be forgotten by a grateful Nation.

**🎬****Watch:** [President Trump at the 38th National Peace Officers’ Memorial Service](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04e94d9729&e=3ee4985eea)

**“We come together** to pay tribute to the American peace officers who made supreme sacrifice, all in the line of duty, in many cases for people they never met,” the President said outside the U.S. Capitol. “To all of the families of our fallen officers: Our whole country is praying for you, embracing you, and pledging to you that we will never, ever leave your side.”

**Our Nation’s leaders** have a responsibility to honor this sacrifice, as well as set the tone for our country’s discourse about the importance of law enforcement. “In my administration, we strongly condemn hateful anti-police rhetoric,” President Trump said today. We hope more public officials will follow his example.

**“To every mom and dad,** brother and sister, spouse and child of the brave fallen officers we honor today, America joins together in expressing our love and our gratitude, our grief, and our firm resolve to be with you every single step of the way,” the President said.

“**We will never** let you down.”

[President Trump: Our fallen officers were the “very best of us.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=43a9f21e1a&e=3ee4985eea)

**In photos:** [The President at the National Police Officers’ Memorial Service](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=043aa2c74a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Protecting free speech—in all its forms**

**Social media platforms** should advance freedom of speech in our country. Yet too many Americans have seen their accounts suspended, banned, or fraudulently reported for unclear “violations” of user policies after sharing their political views online.

**The Trump Administration** wants to help these Americans get their voices back.

**No matter your views** , if you suspect political bias has caused you to be censored or silenced online, we want to hear about it.

[Please consider sharing your story with President Trump.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=08fb699abc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Jason Yates
subject: How many federal judges have been nominated and confirmed?
body:
| | Peter, Just two years in, President Trump’s appeals court confirmations are at a historic high point, exceeding the pace of the last five presidents and doubling the number of judges confirmed to federal appeals courts in 2018. Earlier this year, the President turned a primarily Democratic federal appeals court into one with a majority of Republican presidents’ choices. And overall he continues to stock the courts with conservative appointees who could have a profound effect for many of our nation’s biggest issues. His picks for the nation’s 13 circuit courts included younger nominees, securing a significant, long-standing, conservative imprint on the federal judicial system to make decisions on cases involving abortion, immigration, civil rights, and government regulation. Since the Supreme Court can only hear a small portion of petitions it reviews, these courts play a major role in shaping the laws of our nation. **How many federal judges have been nominated by President Trump and confirmed?** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RsgCKSTrMvT03VGDhbTbsLuXYbUagm7n83MCdVQNexF_D9d2hwjxZuo6se2p_MHphOYw-HHSmVXCdxU0rNhIzHgwgij4Pm-cwdKJDGzYzOGkhHUlux03zmJ8lSWoLImjdsZ6mvWlctK-841gAu9Pb-g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190516qna01&n=1) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RsgCKSTrMvT03VGDhbTbsLuXYbUagm7n83MCdVQNexF_D9d2hwjxZuo6se2p_MHphOYw-HHSmVXCdxU0rNhIzHgwgij4Pm-cwdKJDGzYzOGk4Sh0Qfhdhen3RfYJ3SU3HkKVnCrHJ5YLmkN38DXy3e8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190516qna01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RsgCKSTrMvT03VGDhbTbsLuXYbUagm7n83MCdVQNexF_D9d2hwjxZuo6se2p_MHphOYw-HHSmVXCdxU0rNhIzHgwgij4Pm-cwdKJDGzYzOGknufJDkieHrvu3lGcd97AhDoAmLruOw5rNz3wqljuKTU&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190516qna01&n=3) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=Ou1Uor2aiLeLyreThul0RsgCKSTrMvT03VGDhbTbsLuXYbUagm7n83MCdVQNexF_D9d2hwjxZuo6se2p_MHphOYw-HHSmVXCdxU0rNhIzHgwgij4Pm-cwdKJDGzYzOGkMdAtxd2HhrjzFZuwR8itSfRdNwcw7CIxAbz48OxunTQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190516qna01&n=4) **United. name: Kamala Harris
subject: We must be clear about the stakes of this election
body:
Yesterday, when I asked you to donate to groups fighting for abortion
access in Alabama, my team and I knew we could count on you to step up in
a big way. But we had no way to predict how overwhelming your support
would be.

Together, we raised more than $160,000 for local and national groups
protecting access to women’s health care, including abortion. That is
nothing short of incredible.

Now, these organizations can put the funds we raised to good use helping
women access the care they need. Your generosity will have a direct impact
on real women’s lives.

It’s a testament to you and your commitment to this fight for our values
in the face of great adversity. It’s a testament to our collective power
-- to what’s possible when we work together.

Today, I’m asking you to take another step in this fight by making
your very first
contribution to our campaign for president. Our country needs a leader in
the White House who isn’t afraid to take on tough fights -- including the
fight to defend women’s health care.

You can pitch in to our campaign here:

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Abortion bans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
An Alabama bill that effectively bans abortion in the state and punishes the doctors who provide them with 99 years in prison was just signed into law.
Let me be clear: this bill is a partisan and dangerous attack on a woman's right to live as a free and equal citizen in our country.
I plan to do everything in my power to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and protect women, just as I have since my very first day in office. This bill -- and 20 others like it enacted across the country in 2019 alone -- shows that we all must speak out. This fight requires your voice too, everyone.
[**Please join me and recommit to doing everything in your power to uphold _Roe v. Wade_ and protect a woman's right to be a free and equal citizen in America.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2c7/2a380d31/39ca8099/f12aee/3675337413/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20190515_AL-Abortion?source=e20190516_Abortion-AL_RO&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Overturning _Roe v. Wade_ is no longer just a threat. It's here. Efforts are underway now, and real people are about to suffer the consequences.
We have to fight harder than we've ever fought before to stop these bans, win back state legislatures, and ensure that we have a Supreme Court that will uphold women's fundamental rights. We can't let up, not even for a second.
We'll fight this head on, and we'll do it together. We can't afford not to -- there is just too much at stake.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We Have a New Goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05162019_newsletter_2&n=1) On Tuesday night, we held our long-anticipated outdoor rally in Washington Square Park in New York. Our team had been planning this event for weeks in advance. We were working around the clock to make it a success. Then, we woke up Tuesday morning to find it was going to rain. We became worried that nobody would show up—but instead, when I arrived at the rally site, there were nearly 3,000 supporters gathered in the pouring rain. [](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuCVuf9PTvqgrewb8dgyVAK&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05162019_newsletter_2&n=2 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") At that moment, I realized we never should have doubted. The Yang Gang is energized and ready to win this election. A little rain won’t stop us. In fact, the rain had an upside: it shocked the reporters who were covering the rally in the media tent in the back. One reporter even told my staff that he could not believe our massive turnout. His exact words? “None of this makes any sense!” [](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuCVuf9PTvqgrewb8dgyVAK&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05162019_newsletter_2&n=3 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") The media is just catching on to what all of us have known for a long time now. We can win this whole election and implement the Freedom Dividend to guarantee $1,000 per month for all Americans. We can change this country and build a human-centered economy for all. **We are drawing some of the largest crowds in the race and polling at 3% when most Americans have never heard of me.** And in the next few months, we are going to build on our momentum by hiring organizers in the critical early states, expanding our social media presence, and getting coverage in major national press outlets. [**But to achieve all those things, we need to be focused on one major goal between now and the FEC reporting deadline at the end of June—we need to raise $3.5 million. Click here to contribute and help us reach our new goal.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuCVuf9PTvqgrewb8dgyVAK&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05162019_newsletter_2&n=4 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") I know, it’s a pretty big number, but if we can meet this goal, we will DOUBLE our numbers from last quarter. Imagine if we make it, Friend. Think about turning on CNN and seeing their reports that our fundraising numbers in July have captured the attention of the country. [**So I’m asking you today—chip in to help us raise $3.5M by the end of June.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuCVuf9PTvqgrewb8dgyVAK&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=05162019_newsletter_2&n=5 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") If everyone on this list donates $20, we will hit our goal instantly. That is the MATH. With your help, we make the case that we are the candidate to beat in 2020. Humanity First, -Andrew

name: Dan Baer
subject: Let's help people in Ohio, Georgia, and Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Will you join me in supporting pro-choice groups at the frontlines fending off this Republican assault on women's health and rights?
|
---

| | You've probably seen the news. Republicans in three different states just created new laws that: Make abortion a crime after 6 weeks -- before many women know they are pregnant. **(OHIO & GEORGIA)** Outlaw access to abortion -- no exceptions for rape or incest.**(ALABAMA)** Punish doctors who provide abortions with felony level convictions -- up to 99 years in prison. **(ALABAMA)** What's more appalling? Republicans across the country are vowing to follow suit. This is a blatant and coordinated attack on _Roe v. Wade_. Here's what we can do to help: [**We can support pro-choice organizations at the frontlines fending off this Republican assault on women 's rights by contributing directly to the groups below. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826f1/232dfd1/9258b11/62a16d47/1306758833/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/danbaer-hb314_cut") **• National Network of Abortion Funds: **is a group that works towards removing barriers for low-income individuals seeking an abortion. **• The Yellowhammer Fund:** provides funding for anyone seeking care at one of Alabama's three abortion clinics and will help with other barriers to access (travel, lodging, etc.). **• National Asian Pacific American Women's Forum:** is an organization dedicated to supporting Asian American women, including resources to reproductive health options. **• Women Have Options:** is a non-profit organization dedicated to helping Ohioans access their reproductive health services. **• Mississippi Reproductive Freedom Fund:** is a group that offers financial assistance and practical support to Mississippians seeking reproductive health services. **• Access Reproductive Care - Southeast:** is a volunteer organization that helps Southerners and their families find safe, compassionate, and affordable reproductive care. These new laws are misogyny in legal form. They are about controlling women and their bodies. I will always defend a woman's right to make decisions with her doctor and without the government on what is right for her health. Will you join me? [**If you 're outraged by Republicans' assault on women's health and rights, please join me today in supporting pro-choice organizations at the frontline of this important fight. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826f1/232dfd1/9258b11/62a16d47/1306758833/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/danbaer-hb314_cut") Thank you, Dan ** **

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump to Unveil Immigration Plan Calling for New Merit-Based Points System
body:
"President Trump Thursday will unveil a detailed new vision for legislation overhauling the U.S. legal immigration system." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fdb93a3168&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump to Unveil Immigration Plan Calling for New Merit-Based Points System**

“President Trump Thursday will unveil a detailed new vision for legislation overhauling the U.S. legal immigration system, rewarding skills and education as part of a new points system,” Steven Nelson reports for the _Washington Examiner_.

“Under the Trump plan, the share of legal immigrants permitted entry based on job skills would rise from 12% to 57%. Family bonds as a justification for legal entry would fall from 66% to 33%. Asylum and diversity admissions would fall from 22% to 10%.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd45f43a48&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| On the heels of numerous claims of political bias within some of America’s most powerful tech companies, “the White House has launched an online form asking people to share their experiences if they think political partisanship has led them to be silenced by social media sites,” Barbara Ortutay reports for _[The Associated Press](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4759f50337&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The form does not ask respondents their political affiliation.”

**Share your story** : [The Trump Administration is fighting for free speech online.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f0063b1f7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| A major U.S. company announced this morning that it is “joining a White House initiative to provide training for new skills to U.S. workers,” _[Reuters](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b9b2359b4&e=3ee4985eea)_ reports. Salesforce.com Inc, “which makes Internet-based software used by the sales and marketing departments of businesses, said it would provide online training for . . . workers to get jobs that involve Salesforce’s software systems.” That commitment, which Salesforce upped to 1,000,000 new job training opportunities at its announcement this morning, comes as part of the White House’s “Pledge to America’s Workers,” spearheaded by Ivanka Trump.
---
|
---
| “The U.S. Border Patrol's busiest region on the southern border now expects to spend more than $20 million on consumable items and services for asylum-seekers, up from the $12.5 million it had budgeted for the year due to a continued surge of families illegally crossing into the United States, according to federal data obtained by the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53fa56f585&e=3ee4985eea)_ ,” Anna Giaritelli writes. “Nearly 250,000 people who illegally crossed into the U.S. as part of a ‘family unit’ have been taken into custody across the southern border since October.”

clean_body: "President Trump Thursday will unveil a detailed new vision for legislation overhauling the U.S. legal immigration system." | | | | | | | President Trump to Unveil Immigration Plan Calling for New Merit-Based Points System “President Trump Thursday will unveil a detailed new vision for legislation overhauling the U.S. legal immigration system, rewarding skills and education as part of a new points system,” Steven Nelson reports for the Washington Examiner. “Under the Trump plan, the share of legal immigrants permitted entry based on job skills would rise from 12% to 57%. Family bonds as a justification for legal entry would fall from 66% to 33%. Asylum and diversity admissions would fall from 22% to 10%.” | | On the heels of numerous claims of political bias within some of America’s most powerful tech companies, “the White House has launched an online form asking people to share their experiences if they think political partisanship has led them to be silenced by social media sites,” Barbara Ortutay reports for . “The form does not ask respondents their political affiliation.” Share your story : | | A major U.S. company announced this morning that it is “joining a White House initiative to provide training for new skills to U.S. workers,” reports. Salesforce.com Inc, “which makes Internet-based software used by the sales and marketing departments of businesses, said it would provide online training for . . . workers to get jobs that involve Salesforce’s software systems.” That commitment, which Salesforce upped to 1,000,000 new job training opportunities at its announcement this morning, comes as part of the White House’s “Pledge to America’s Workers,” spearheaded by Ivanka Trump. | | “The U.S. Border Patrol's busiest region on the southern border now expects to spend more than $20 million on consumable items and services for asylum-seekers, up from the $12.5 million it had budgeted for the year due to a continued surge of families illegally crossing into the United States, according to federal data obtained by the ,” Anna Giaritelli writes. “Nearly 250,000 people who illegally crossed into the U.S. as part of a ‘family unit’ have been taken into custody across the southern border since October.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Tim Kaine
subject: This chills my blood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

Donald Trump is taking steps that I fear are leading us directly towards an unnecessary war with Iran. That chills my blood. [**So let me be clear: I am going to do anything I can to stop him from sidestepping Congress to start an illegal war.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1775/3e0906/7b23c76b/3e30b5d2/4294487462/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/we-should-not-enter-into-an-unnecessary-war-in-the-middle-east?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+So+let+me+be+clear+I+am+going+to+do+anyt&utm_campaign=20190516_1_PET_TK_Iran_Full&source=20190516_1_PET_TK_Iran_Full")

Here are the facts:
* It's been a year since Trump withdrew from a diplomatic deal that prevented Iran from building up nuclear weapons.
* Since then, his administration has taken a series of actions to increase tensions between our two countries, including misrepresenting the regular deployment of the USS Abraham Lincoln as a warning to Iran.
* Last week, Iran's president announced that they would stop some commitments under the nuclear deal.
* Now, Trump has drawn up plans to send 120,000 American troops into a new war in the Middle East.

I'm concerned that Trump is on the verge of taking dangerous -- and possibly illegal -- action against Iran. Because, as with the presidents who came before him, **_this President has no legal authority to start a war without the consent of Congress._**

I wrote in the _Atlantic_ last summer that my top priority is keeping Americans safe, which includes reducing the risk of unnecessary war. [**I fear that, thanks to Donald Trump's recklessness -- and his reliance on dangerously hawkish advisers like John Bolton -- we are on the verge of blundering into exactly that.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1775/3e0906/7b23c76b/3e30b5d1/4294487462/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/we-should-not-enter-into-an-unnecessary-war-in-the-middle-east?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+I+fear+that+thanks+to+Donald+Trumps+reck&utm_campaign=20190516_1_PET_TK_Iran_Full&source=20190516_1_PET_TK_Iran_Full")

**What can we do about it?** As a Senator, I'm working to make sure the President can't unilaterally start a war. Trump *must* seek Congressional approval before he rushes the U.S. into another ill-advised offensive war in the Middle East. And as a citizen, I'm standing with all those who would oppose such an unnecessary war -- as concerned Americans, we owe it to our servicemembers to make sure Trump knows exactly how we feel about his antagonistic and inflammatory behavior.

[**Will you add your name to mine to say you oppose entering into an unnecessary war in the Middle East?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1775/3e0906/7b23c76b/3e30b5d0/4294487462/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/we-should-not-enter-into-an-unnecessary-war-in-the-middle-east?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+add+your+name+to+mine+to+say+yo&utm_campaign=20190516_1_PET_TK_Iran_Full&source=20190516_1_PET_TK_Iran_Full")

By all accounts the President appears to be cheerleading a war with Iran. That's beyond irresponsible -- it's deeply dangerous, and it's not what the American public, nor our servicemembers, deserve.

Thank you for reading,

_Tim_

Look, we couldn't agree more.

Donald Trump has managed to rack up a MULTI-TRILLION dollar deficit during a period of low unemployment in the country. _It 's almost impossible to do that!_

Even worse, he's incited a trade war with China which has put the livelihood of our farmers and ranchers on the line.

Farm incomes are on track to be down $12 BILLION this year, corn and soybean prices have plummeted, and farm bankruptcies are near record levels in many regions.

Michael knows that putting tariffs on the Chinese is actually putting taxes on American producers, farmers, consumers, and workers.

It's completely the wrong way of doing this.
[If you agree that Donald Trump is absolutely wrong, add your name >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2f8/134673f2/4423160/699117c1/1649520695/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Stop-Trump?source=EM_PET_B1_051619_AC&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Access to safe, legal abortion is a constitutional right -- and we're going to fight this with everything we've got. If you'd like to take action today, here are some options... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b85/1601436750/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
I want to talk about what happened yesterday in Alabama.

And this morning in Missouri. And last week in Georgia. And in Arkansas and Mississippi in March. And in North Dakota and Ohio in April.

**Right now, a woman 's constitutional right to abortion is under attack.**

States across the country are passing tighter and tighter restrictions making it harder, if not impossible, to access safe abortion or trying to ban it outright. In fact, most of these restrictions come into place before a woman would even know she's pregnant.

It's important to say why this is happening right now: **Republicans are on the march to overturn Roe v. Wade.**

And thanks to Donald Trump stacking the courts with anti-choice judges, that could be a real possibility.

Access to safe, legal abortion is a constitutional right -- and we're going to fight this with everything we've got.

**I 'll have more details on how to fight back soon, but if you'd like to take action today, here are some options:**
1. **ORGANIZE:** If you are ready to organize and take action in your community, you can stay up-to-date on the latest news here: **[http://www.stopabortionbans.org](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b84/1601436750/VEsE/ "http://www.stopabortionbans.org").**
2. **DONATE:** If you want to help fund local groups on the frontlines of providing reproductive care, consider making a donation to the **[National Network of Abortion Funds](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b87/1601436750/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiMjAxOTA1MTZlbTEtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-stopthebans?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190516em1-full").**
3. **RUN:** If you're ready to kick anti-choice lawmakers out of office, learn more about running for office yourself here: **[dlcc.org](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b86/1601436750/VEsC/ "https://dlcc.org")** , **[emilyslist.org](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b89/1601436750/VEsD/ "https://emilyslist.org")** , **[emergeamerica.org](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b88/1601436750/VEsA/ "https://emergeamerica.org")** , **[runforsomething.net](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b8b/1601436750/VEsB/ "https://runforsomething.net").**

Thanks for being in this fight,

Elizabeth

| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b8a/1601436750/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b8d/1601436750/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b8c/1601436750/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b8f/1601436750/VEsHBA/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994b8e/1601436750/VEsHBw/ "https://www.flickr.com/photos/146043801@N08/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fade/45c30650/98a4b0d1/66994bf1/1601436750/VEsHBg/ "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

body:

| | Look, I'll get right to it:
[**I 'm asking for $19 to help fund our ads and outreach that will turn Colorado blue and bring principled leadership to the Senate.**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826f0/232dfd1/92756b2/62a16d2e/2952363771/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190516_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
Nate Silver said it best: **_" A Republican victory in Colorado would all but guarantee a GOP majority, so this race is a must-win for Democrats."_** This is the most important Senate race in the country. And hear me out. We *can* actually win here. The latest poll has my opponent Cory Gardner losing by 8 points to a generic Democratic candidate. **That means that we need a candidate who doesn 't come with the baggage of a career politician, who can run on an affirmative vision for our country. ** Gardner has got to go. In 2019 alone, he's voting in line with Donald Trump 99% of the time. He's bought and paid for by the NRA. He's fought to eliminate a woman's right to choose. Point blank, he's wrong for Colorado. But just because my opponent is underwater doesn't mean this race is a shoe-in. Why do you think he's been in Washington for nearly a decade? **Because wealthy donors and special interests bankroll his campaigns and pave the way every election.** I'm running a grassroots campaign to take on Cory Gardner. I want to win the right way, and I know we can do this if we all band together. That's why I need you. Whatever you can pitch in today will be the reason we finally get Cory Gardner out and flip the Senate. Can I please count on your help to fund the ads and grassroots outreach we need to stand up to Cory Gardner and his special interest backers? | | **[**Donate $19 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826f0/232dfd1/92756b2/62a16d2e/2952363771/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190516_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

name: Update via DWS for Congress
subject: will the GOP get away with this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | It's true. Trump and his GOP are trying to get you to give up by wearing you down. Are you going to let them win?

We need 183 more people to step up. Let's show them what we've got. [**_Chip in now._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113dad/622b7b5b/1fb303da/307b5057/2321132184/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-may19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190516_2_2&amount=10&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+now&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190516_2_2&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190516_2_2")

[**_https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/Dems-Fight-Back_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113dad/622b7b5b/1fb303da/307b5056/2321132184/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-may19?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190516_2_2&amount=10&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuredebbiewassermanschultzcomDems&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190516_2_2&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190516_2_2")

\--- Original Message---

Listen, we'll be honest: the GOP is counting on us to back down.

That's what this is all about. The constant lies, misdirection, and purposeful confusion. They want us to get so frustrated that we eventually give up. **In fact, some believe that grassroots fundraising for Democrats is going to slow.**

---
Peter, we've had a busy week on the road! We made our first campaign stops in New Hampshire to talk to voters, where Joe outlined why he's running for president, and his vision for America. **We wanted to thank you for hitting our fundraising goal, making this possible and sharing with you some highlights!** [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319ba1/1cd0ac28/39401f8e/356b3890/1365578104/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190516pictures-b2_FDR_sendwide_NA-F1_S3_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190516pictures&utm_content=b2_FDR_sendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S3_C1&amount=25") Even with rain and chilly temperatures in Nashua, NH, the excitement for Joe and these ideals was clear. [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319ba1/1cd0ac28/39401f8e/356b3890/1365578104/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190516pictures-b2_FDR_sendwide_NA-F1_S3_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190516pictures&utm_content=b2_FDR_sendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S3_C1&amount=25") We heard from New Hampshire voters about the issues they care about, like education, health care, and finally addressing the opioid crisis by expanding access to mental health care, including treatment for addiction.

As we travelled around the Granite State we talked about the amazing work New Hampshire has done to expand Medicaid -- _work that needs to be protected and built on._ [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319ba1/1cd0ac28/39401f8e/356b3890/1365578104/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190516pictures-b2_FDR_sendwide_NA-F1_S3_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190516pictures&utm_content=b2_FDR_sendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S3_C1&amount=25") All of this was made possible because of your support. These conversations are crucial for this campaign, but also for this country as we come together to get back on track.

**Joe is running for three basic reasons: To restore the soul of the nation, to rebuild the backbone of this country which is the middle class, and finally, to unify us all.** Together we can choose hope over fear, unity over division, truth over lies, and science over fiction.

Thanks for an amazing week, and looking forward to the many still to come.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Sign my petition: tell Congress to pass legislation that would prohibit military action against Iran without Congressional approval.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
Real American power is not shown by our ability to blow things up...
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1)

**A war in Iran would make the Iraq war look like a walk in the park. It will be an unmitigated disaster.

Sign my petition: Tell Congress to pass legislation that would prohibit military action against Iran without Congressional approval.**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_iran_petition/?source=em190516-iran-2-30&refcode2=1380.150750.MTPHi1&t=2&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1)

* * *
Friends -
Here is a truth you don’t often hear in the newspapers, on television or in the halls of Congress, but it is a truth we must face, especially as the Trump administration appears to be marching us closer to armed conflict with Iran:
**And that truth is that far too often American intervention and the use of American military power has produced unintended consequences which have caused incalculable harm.**
Real American power is not demonstrated by our ability to blow things up, but our ability to forge international consensus around shared challenges.
A test of a great nation is not how many wars we can engage in or how many governments we can overthrow, but how we can use our strength to resolve international conflicts in a peaceful way.
And it is almost beyond impossible to imagine that after the horrors of the war in Iraq — a war that upended the regional order of the Middle East and resulted in an untold loss of life — that this administration would put us on such a dangerous path toward more war. But everyday we see a new story about how this administration is trying provoke conflict, like sending huge bombers to the region, or raising the possibility of sending more than 100,000 troops.
Apparently for some, almost two decades of constant war is not enough.
Well, unfortunately for this president and people like John Bolton who love endless wars, the constitutional authority for declaring war rests with the United States Congress — not the president –– no matter if that president is a Democrat or a Republican.
And it is long past time my colleagues in the Senate reassert that authority. That is something I tried to do with my colleagues to stop our involvement in the war in Yemen, and it is something we must do again as the president marches us toward war with Iran.
Please add your name if you agree:
[ **Sign my petition: tell Congress to pass legislation that would prohibit military action against Iran without Congressional approval.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_iran_petition/?source=em190516-iran-2-30&refcode2=1380.150750.MTPHi1&t=3&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1)
One of the first speeches I gave in Congress was about the first war in Iraq in 1991; a war I voted against.
And what I said at the time was that our challenge at that moment was not simply to begin a war which would result in tremendous suffering and death, but that the real challenge was to address international conflict without war and bloodshed.
It seemed to me that it would be a terrible failing, and very ominous for our future, if we could not solve that problem non-violently when virtually the entire world was united against one small country. And that if we were not successful in that effort, all this world would have to look forward to in the future would be war, and more war, and more war.
There are a number of parallels to this moment in time.
Today, our most important allies are committed to preventing the possibility that Iran’s undemocratic regime could ever obtain a nuclear weapon.
That is what the Iran deal was all about. And that was why it was such a reckless mistake for Trump to withdraw from the Iran deal, as even his own top security officials said at the time. Rather than remain united with those allies, Trump's approach has actually isolated the United States from them, undermining the important consensus that the Obama administration helped forge, and raising the possibility of conflict.
And it seems to me that, once again, if we turn our backs on a non-violent solution in favor of more military conflict, that we will find ourselves in perpetual warfare. Mark my words. A war in Iran would make the Iraq war look like a walk in the park. It will be an unmitigated disaster.
So Congress must intervene and utilize its constitutional authority — before it’s too late.
And I hope you’ll make your voice heard if you agree:
[ **Sign my petition: tell Congress to pass legislation that would prohibit military action against Iran without Congressional approval.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_iran_petition/?source=em190516-iran-2-30&refcode2=1380.150750.MTPHi1&t=4&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1)
Throughout the world today, hundreds of millions of people live in abysmal poverty while the arms merchants of the world grow increasingly rich as governments spend trillions of dollars on weapons and war.
Our job is to offer a different vision — a vision that one day human beings on this planet will live in a world where international conflicts are resolved peacefully, not by mass murder.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_iran_petition/?source=em190516-iran-2-30&refcode2=1380.150750.MTPHi1&t=5&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1380_150750_MTPHi1&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=9&akid=1380%2E150750%2EMTPHi1).

Hey -

I just got back from delivering a $100,000 check to the Florida Democratic Party. This investment is a piece of the nearly $500,000 we've committed to grassroots efforts through organizations big and small across the state. We're just getting started. Consider this a down payment on the historic investment we are making to empower people to have a voice in their government.

We are partnering with dedicated grassroots organizations throughout Florida to register and re-engage a million voters. Today's check was only a small part of the initial $500,000 investment we're making and we're relying on grassroots supporters like you to help provide the resources we need to lead Florida and our nationforward.

**This isn't an easy task y'all, because there are folks out there with deep pockets who know how important Florida is and want to stop the people from having their voices heard.**

**The truth is that they're not counting on grassroots supporters like you to lift us up. But you can prove them wrong and help lead us forward.**

**Our future is on the ballot.**

This historic effort can be the beginning of a new path forward in Florida, and across the nation, but only if we roll up our sleeves and work together.

**[The urgency of now is greater with every passing moment, and together we can turn Florida blue, and defeat Donald Trump, but only if grassroots supporters like you make an investment in our future today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35bf/9e00690/6bcfd966/24074f5e/1692591539/VEsF/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJNaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+The+urgency+of+now+is+greater+with+every&utm_campaign=051619-es-ffa-fr-d&source=051619-es-ffa-fr-d")**

We've got to organize, register voters, empower folks sitting on the sidelines, and engage with communities to know their own power, and have the resources we need to overcome the obstacles people put in our way.

I believe in you, and I believe in us.

Now, let's make it happen.

Andrew Gillum

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump just proposed the most pro-immigrant, pro-America immigration plan in history
body:
From the White House Rose Garden this afternoon, President Trump unveiled his plan to create a fair, modern, and lawful immigration system. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ab91aa426&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 16, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump just proposed the most pro-immigrant, pro-America immigration plan in history**

**President Donald J. Trump** addressed Americans from the White House Rose Garden this afternoon, unveiling his Administration’s plan to create a fair, modern, and lawful system of immigration for the United States of America.
**🎬 Watch** : [The first real overhaul of America’s entry system in 50 years](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8dc516e52c&e=3ee4985eea)
**The President’s plan,** once adopted by Congress, would achieve two crucial goals. First, it will stop illegal immigration for good by fully securing our border. Second, it establishes a new legal immigration system that will protect American wages, promote American values, and attract the best and brightest talent from across the globe.

**“This plan was not developed** by the politicians,” President Trump said. “It was designed with significant input from our great law enforcement professionals.”

**Here is a rundown** of the most important proposals from the President’s speech:
* Create a permanent, self-sustaining [border security trust fund](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5dc9d9433&e=3ee4985eea) for law enforcement, financed with fees collected at the border crossings themselves

* Restore integrity to America’s broken asylum process by [expediting relief for legitimate asylum seekers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f107cdf528&e=3ee4985eea)—and sending those who abuse the system home

* Modernize the dysfunctional legal immigration process by [increasing the number of legal immigrants selected based on skill](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2cca9447e&e=3ee4985eea) or merit from 12 percent to 57 percent

* Prioritize the immediate family of new immigrants—spouses and children—by moving them to the front of the line over distant relatives who use family claims as a tool to get ahead in the queue

* Establish a standard, universal, points-based criteria for admission to the United States, no matter where you are born or who you are related to

**The big idea** in President Trump’s plan is that “pro-America” and “pro-immigrant” are synonyms, not opposites. Illegal immigration hurts everyone. A random, unfair entry process hurts everyone. And underfunded law enforcement hurts everyone.

**The only ones opposed** to a safer, stronger immigration system are the special interests profiting off the status quo. That includes everyone from the corporations who exploit cheap, illegal labor to the politicians who benefit from never resolving the issue.

**“Many of the Democrats** have claimed to be for these concepts at different times in their careers and, in many cases, in very recent history,” President Trump said today. “And I hope that they will end up joining me and all of the people gathered together today in putting politics aside, putting security and wages first, and pursuing these historic reforms. It’s time.”

[Watch President Trump’s full speech on today’s immigration plan.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a7024c44d&e=3ee4985eea)

**The transcript** : [Read the President’s full remarks from the Rose Garden ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29edaabcdf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Pledge to America’s Workers grows by another million**

**During a visit** from Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump to Salesforce Tower in Indianapolis this morning, the software giant pledged to join the White House’s initiative to reskill the American workforce. But in a surprise move, Salesforce.com INC Co-CEO Marc Benioff doubled his company’s original commitment, pledging to provide new skills training for _1 million_ of our country’s workers.

**“Salesforce** is proud to sign the Pledge to America’s Workers and help people of every background learn the skills they need to find their place in the digital economy,” he said.

**In today’s booming** but rapidly changing economy, skills training is becoming indispensable. No American should be left behind in the process. More than 200 companies have signed on to President Trump’s Pledge to America’s Workers so far, and with today’s pledge, more than 8.9 million training opportunities have been promised.

**“We must aim** for inclusive growth by creating pathways for all Americans to get the tools and skills they need for rewarding careers,” Ivanka Trump said.

[Watch Ivanka Trump discuss workforce training at Salesforce Tower. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd6f76cdf5&e=3ee4985eea)

**See the Pledge:** [8.9 million opportunities—and climbing!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b78956650&e=3ee4985eea)

Trump addressed Americans from the White House Rose Garden this afternoon, unveiling his Administration’s plan to create a fair, modern, and lawful system of immigration for the United States of America. 🎬 Watch : The President’s plan, once adopted by Congress, would achieve two crucial goals. First, it will stop illegal immigration for good by fully securing our border. Second, it establishes a new legal immigration system that will protect American wages, promote American values, and attract the best and brightest talent from across the globe. “This plan was not developed by the politicians,” President Trump said. “It was designed with significant input from our great law enforcement professionals.” Here is a rundown of the most important proposals from the President’s speech: Create a permanent, self-sustaining for law enforcement, financed with fees collected at the border crossings themselves Restore integrity to America’s broken asylum process by —and sending those who abuse the system home Modernize the dysfunctional legal immigration process by or merit from 12 percent to 57 percent Prioritize the immediate family of new immigrants—spouses and children—by moving them to the front of the line over distant relatives who use family claims as a tool to get ahead in the queue Establish a standard, universal, points-based criteria for admission to the United States, no matter where you are born or who you are related to The big idea in President Trump’s plan is that “pro-America” and “pro-immigrant” are synonyms, not opposites. Illegal immigration hurts everyone. A random, unfair entry process hurts everyone. And underfunded law enforcement hurts everyone. The only ones opposed to a safer, stronger immigration system are the special interests profiting off the status quo. That includes everyone from the corporations who exploit cheap, illegal labor to the politicians who benefit from never resolving the issue. “Many of the Democrats have claimed to be for these concepts at different times in their careers and, in many cases, in very recent history,” President Trump said today. “And I hope that they will end up joining me and all of the people gathered together today in putting politics aside, putting security and wages first, and pursuing these historic reforms. It’s time.” The transcript : | | Pledge to America’s Workers grows by another million During a visit from Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump to Salesforce Tower in Indianapolis this morning, the software giant pledged to join the White House’s initiative to reskill the American workforce. But in a surprise move, Salesforce.com INC Co-CEO Marc Benioff doubled his company’s original commitment, pledging to provide new skills training for 1 million of our country’s workers. “Salesforce is proud to sign the Pledge to America’s Workers and help people of every background learn the skills they need to find their place in the digital economy,” he said. In today’s booming but rapidly changing economy, skills training is becoming indispensable. No American should be left behind in the process. More than 200 companies have signed on to President Trump’s Pledge to America’s Workers so far, and with today’s pledge, more than 8.9 million training opportunities have been promised. “We must aim for inclusive growth by creating pathways for all Americans to get the tools and skills they need for rewarding careers,” Ivanka Trump said.
